What We Offer

Pool Solutions, Perfected

◆

Custom Design

Every pool begins with your vision. Our designers craft unique shapes, finishes, and features tailored precisely to your space and lifestyle.

◈

Pool Construction

From excavation to the final tile, our teams execute flawlessly using premium materials and proven techniques honed over a decade.

◇

Renovation & Upgrades

Breathe new life into an existing pool. We modernise, retile, relight, and re-engineer to today's standards of luxury.

◉

Maintenance Plans

Keep your investment pristine with our tailored maintenance packages — chemical balancing, cleaning, and equipment servicing.

"Diamond Aqua Pools turned our backyard into a five-star resort. Matthew and his team were exceptional from start to finish."

Diamond Standard

Where Craftsmanship
Meets the Water

For over a decade, Diamond Aqua Pools has been synonymous with precision, elegance, and pools that become the centrepiece of every property.

Our Story

Built on Passion,
Driven by Excellence

Since 2014

A Decade of Diamond-Grade Pools

Diamond Aqua Pools was founded on a simple but powerful belief: every homeowner deserves a pool that doesn't just hold water — it holds memories. What started as a one-man operation in Johannesburg has grown into one of South Africa's most trusted names in luxury pool construction.

Over 12 years, we have built more than 340 pools across Gauteng and beyond, earning our reputation not through advertising, but through the referrals of satisfied clients who proudly call Diamond Aqua Pools part of their home's story.

◆Precision craftsmanship
◆Premium materials only
◆On-time, on-budget delivery
◆Post-build support

The People Behind the Pools

Meet the Founders

Family-owned. Quality-driven.

Matthew du Plessis

Founder & Managing Director

Matthew launched Diamond Aqua Pools in 2014 with nothing more than a shovel, a dream, and an uncompromising standard. Over the past 12 years, he has personally overseen every major project, building a company that clients trust completely. His background in civil construction and passion for design gave Diamond Aqua Pools its unique edge — pools that are structurally superior and visually stunning.

📍 Johannesburg📧 info@diamondaquapools.co.za

Emily van der Merwe

Co-Owner & Office Manager

Emily is the heartbeat of Diamond Aqua Pools' operations. Managing everything from client relations to project coordination and accounts, her warm professionalism ensures every client journey is seamless from the first call to the final handover. Emily's dedication makes sure no promise ever goes unkept.

📍 Johannesburg📧 info@diamondaquapools.co.za

Transparent Pricing

Invest in Your
Dream Pool

We believe in transparency. Our packages are designed to suit different needs and budgets — each delivering the Diamond Aqua Pools standard of quality. All prices are estimates; contact us for a personalised quote.

Essential
From R 180,000

The perfect entry into luxury — a clean, functional pool that elevates any backyard.

  • ✦ Up to 30m² pool surface
  • ✦ Standard rectangular design
  • ✦ Blue plaster or pebble finish
  • ✦ LED underwater lighting
  • ✦ Filter & pump installation
  • ✦ Tiled coping & surrounds
  • ✦ 2-year structural warranty
Most Popular
Signature
From R 350,000

Our bestselling package — a premium pool with designer touches and added features.

  • ✦ Up to 55m² pool surface
  • ✦ Custom shape design
  • ✦ Dark-water or quartz finish
  • ✦ Smart LED colour lighting
  • ✦ Integrated spa / jacuzzi
  • ✦ Water feature (waterfall/jets)
  • ✦ Travertine or granite coping
  • ✦ 5-year structural warranty
Diamond Elite
From R 700,000

The pinnacle of pool design — fully bespoke with every luxury feature imaginable.

  • ✦ Unlimited custom sizing
  • ✦ Infinity edge design option
  • ✦ Premium Black Quartz finish
  • ✦ Full smart home automation
  • ✦ Integrated spa & sun shelf
  • ✦ Fire features & water walls
  • ✦ Outdoor lighting & landscape
  • ✦ 10-year structural warranty

💡 Prices are indicative and vary based on site conditions, design complexity, and finish selection.
All projects include a full design consultation and detailed quote before commencement.
